name: fandianzhihou-life-tools
description: Mock Tool Layer for the OpenClaw local-life butler hackathon demo.

tools.name: scene.detect
tools.description: Detect local-life scene signals from user text.

tools.name: activity.discover
tools.description: Return safe, light-explore, and bold-explore activity recommendations.

tools.name: broker.scan
tools.description: Platform broker agent scans nearby venues and available resources.

tools.name: broker.poll-agents
tools.description: Poll personal agents for anonymous interest summaries.

tools.name: broker.propose-groups
tools.description: Generate group proposals from broker scan and personal-agent summaries.

tools.name: group.reserve
tools.description: Reserve a mock merchant package after owner confirmation.
